task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Lucid Air (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $79900.00 and wholesale is $69920.00. Product features: Luxury electric sedan with up to 516-mile range and fast charging. Reference: https://www.lucidmotors.com/air

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Lucid Air. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Lucid Air. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
